item.title: 👍💵John Burbank - Fife RV Center
item.description: John Burbank signed up to testify Pro. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓💵Travis Dutton - Washington State Association of Counties / Policy Coordinator
item.description: Travis Dutton signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington State Association of Counties / Policy Coordinator. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓Scott Hutsell - Lincoln County - Washington State
item.description: Scott Hutsell signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Lincoln County - Washington State.
